package.prompt: In the warehouse order desk, `gather(items)` in `order_desk/api.py` should return the normalized labels for just the order items passed to it. It works the first time, but on later calls it also returns order labels from earlier calls -- results leak across invocations. Fix `fill` in `order_desk/basket.py` so each call starts from a clean collection unless the caller supplies their own. Normalization (`order_desk/normalize.py`) trims and upper-cases each item, for example 'pick' becomes 'PICK' and 'ship' becomes 'SHIP'.

public_tests.tests/test_public.py:
from order_desk.api import gather


def test_separate_calls_are_independent():
    first = gather(["pick", "pack"])
    second = gather(["ship"])
    assert first == ["PICK", "PACK"]
    assert second == ["SHIP"]


def test_single_call_transforms_each_item():
    assert gather(["pick"]) == ["PICK"]

reference_files.order_desk/basket.py:
from order_desk.normalize import normalize


def fill(new_items, basket=None):
    if basket is None:  # PROBE-DROP
        basket = []  # PROBE-DROP
    for item in new_items:
        basket.append(normalize(item))
    return basket

package.title: Stop cross-call leakage in the warehouse order desk
